title: Has One
description: The target model has a foreign key pointing to the source model's primary key. Returns a single model. Example: a User has one Profile — profiles.user_id → users.id.

methodName.title: Method Name
methodName.description: camelCase PHP method on the source model returning the single related instance. E.g. 'profile' for $user->profile().

foreignKey.title: Foreign Key
foreignKey.description: Column on the target model's table that references the source. E.g. 'user_id'.

ownerKey.title: Owner Key
ownerKey.description: Primary key column on the source model's table. Usually 'id'.
